  "text": "The Kubernetes API server admission webhook chain is implemented entirely within the staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/ directory of the sg-evals/kubernetes--v1.32.0 repository. The chain consists of three main components:\n\n1. **Webhook Admission Controllers** (the entry points):\n   - `mutating/plugin.go` — MutatingWebhook admission plugin that implements the mutating admission interface. Its `Admit()` method is the entry point for the mutating webhook chain.\n   - `validating/plugin.go` — ValidatingWebhook admission plugin that implements the validating admission interface. Its `Validate()` method is the entry point for the validating webhook chain.\n\n2. **Webhook Call Dispatch** (calling individual webhooks):\n   - `mutating/dispatcher.go` — Dispatches admission requests to each mutating webhook in sequence, supporting reinvocation.\n   - `validating/dispatcher.go` — Dispatches admission requests to each validating webhook, collecting results.\n   - `generic/webhook.go` — Shared webhook logic including HTTP client invocation, timeout handling, and TLS configuration.\n   - `generic/interfaces.go` — Interfaces for the generic webhook dispatcher.\n   - `mutating/reinvocationcontext.go` — Handles reinvocation semantics for mutating webhooks.\n   - `util/client_config.go` — Builds the HTTP client config for calling webhooks.\n   - `config/kubeconfig.go` — Manages kubeconfig-based auth for webhook calls.\n\n3. **Admission Response Aggregation** (processing webhook responses):\n   - `request/admissionreview.go` — Creates AdmissionReview request objects and parses responses.\n   - `errors/statuserror.go` — Converts webhook response status into Kubernetes API errors.\n   - `matchconditions/matcher.go` — Evaluates CEL-based match conditions to filter which webhooks apply.\n   - `predicates/namespace/matcher.go` — Namespace selector predicate for filtering webhooks.\n   - `predicates/object/matcher.go` — Object selector predicate for filtering webhooks.\n   - `predicates/rules/rules.go` — Rule-based predicate (resource/verb matching) for filtering webhooks.\n   - `accessors.go` — Accessor interfaces for webhook configuration objects (MutatingWebhookConfiguration, ValidatingWebhookConfiguration).\n   - `initializer/initializer.go` — Initializes webhook plugins with required dependencies.\n\nAdditional supporting files include the webhookadmission config API types (v1 and v1alpha1 versions), testing helpers, and generated code."
}
